reviews.title: Fix fleet audit retention resolver surviving repeated writes (#610)

latestRun.body:
Approved: no findings.

I reviewed the PR diff for Issue #610. The guarded in-function dot-source pattern is removed from both affected PowerShell modules, and the new regression check covers repeated fleet audit writes, repeated stale-lock checks, and audit-only failure isolation. Verification passed: focused `scripts/check-audit-retention-guarded-dotsource.ps1`, `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`, `scripts/verify.ps1`, and `scripts/check-reusable.ps1`.

KB note: local KB search did not find pack-specific guidance for Issue #610; general notes on Commit stage / Automated testing support the added fast self-checking regression gate.

Verdict: approved.
